items.title: OpenAI's Codex now encrypts instructions between AI agents, leaving developers blind to internal delegation
items.summary: Since early June, OpenAI's coding tool Codex encrypts the instructions a main agent passes to its subagents. Developers can no longer track how tasks get delegated internally. For the larger GPT-5.6 variants Sol and Terra, the encryption is mandatory. The article OpenAI's Codex now encrypts instructions between AI agents, leaving develope...
